title: Tom Smith Pack of 6 Premium Christmas Crackers Nordic Craft 36cm
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: Premium Crackers: This set includes 6 luxurious Christmas crackers filled with high-quality gifts and surprises.
Elegant Design: The crackers feature a sophisticated colour palette of sage green, white, and rose gold with delicate snowflake patterns.
Festive Tradition: Pulling crackers is a beloved holiday tradition, adding excitement and merriment to celebrations.
Gift Set: Each cracker contains a paper crown, festive joke, and thoughtful gift item, providing entertainment for all ages.
Convenient Pack: The crackers come neatly packaged in a sturdy navy blue box, making them an ideal gift or table centrepiece.
description: Elevate your festive celebrations with these exquisite Christmas crackers from Tom Smith. Each cracker is beautifully crafted with intricate snowflake and floral patterns in soft shades of beige and sage green, lending an elegant touch to your holiday table. Inside, you'll find a delightful assortment of trinkets and party favours to delight your guests. These premium crackers make a thoughtful gift or a charming addition to your own festivities. With their luxurious design and surprise-filled interiors, they're sure to create cherished moments and lasting memories. Embrace the spirit of the season with these enchanting crackers that effortlessly blend style and merriment.
